ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code representing the observation site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where the observation was made */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the observation site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the observation site */,
  "no_observed" INTEGER /* Total number of observations made */,
  "number_by_party_hours" REAL /* Total hours contributed by parties involved in the observation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the observation was made */,
  "editor_comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the editor regarding the observation */,
  "date_of_observation" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "time_of_observation" TEXT /* Time of the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_code FOREIGN KEY ("code") REFERENCES sites ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code representing the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., forest, grassland) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year during which observations were made */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which observations were made (e.g., winter, summer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the observer (e.g., researcher, volunteer) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the observer is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party involved in the observation */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (e.g., research team, conservation group) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_involvements" (
  "involvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each involvement record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party involved in the observation */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution made by the party (e.g., data collection, funding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("involvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_involvements_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_involvements_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editor_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being commented on */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_comments_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_comments_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "editor_name" TEXT /* Name of the editor */,
  "editor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the editor */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_observations" (
  "team_observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-observation relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team conducting the observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being conducted */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question being addressed by the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_observations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_observations_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., csv, xls) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user having the permission */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the permission is for */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of the species (e.g., plant, animal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_species" (
  "observation_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation-species relationship */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species observed */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Abundance of the species observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_species_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)
